summary: All Campaign Journey features and scheduler fixes tested and verified. Backend API returns correct journey data with step statuses. Frontend component renders properly on contact detail page with collapsible timeline. Scheduler code correctly implements AI toggle fix and hourly delay fix.
critical_code_review_comments: scheduler.py (lines 397-422): AI toggle fix correctly implemented - campaign's ai_enabled is the primary control, only uses AI when campaign_ai_enabled AND ai_generated are both true
scheduler.py (lines 555-590): Hourly delay fix correctly implemented - is_daily_or_longer check ensures only daily+ delays get time randomization, hourly campaigns advance without randomization
contacts.py (lines 1236-1316): New get_contact_campaign_journey endpoint returns journey data with steps array containing correct status values (sent/next/upcoming)
CampaignJourney.tsx: Component has proper data-testid attributes, handles all step statuses correctly, auto-expands active campaigns
contact/[id].tsx (line 36): CampaignJourney component imported and integrated

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Campaign Journey UI elements verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Campaign Journey feature fully implemented: (1) Backend endpoint at /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/campaign-journey returns array of journeys with steps containing sent_at/scheduled_at timestamps and correct status values. (2) Frontend CampaignJourney.tsx component auto-expands active campaigns, shows timeline with SENT/NEXT/upcoming statuses, has collapsible cards. (3) Scheduler fixes verified via code review - AI toggle respects campaign.ai_enabled, hourly delays skip randomization.

backend_api.GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}: PASS - Returns journey with steps array, correct statuses
backend_api.Journey structure validation: PASS - All required fields present (campaign_name, status, steps, etc.)
backend_api.Step status values: PASS - Correctly shows sent (with sent_at), next (with scheduled_at), upcoming

frontend_ui.Campaign Journey section renders: PASS - Shows on contact with enrollment
frontend_ui.Timestamps shown: PASS - Sent timestamps and scheduled times displayed
frontend_ui.Progress bar: PASS - Shows Step X of Y correctly

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sending is mocked throughout the app
